heroStatement: Implementing a Worldwide Contextual Data Marketplace
quote: Worked closely with Guillaume to build an end-to-end solution for loading geodata worldwide. He brought not only solid web design knowledge, but all kinds of creative skills... always able to see a problem from new angles.
intro: I led the UX/UI implementation of a global contextual data marketplace within Autodesk Forma. By partnering with various data providers and engineering teams, we built an end-to-end solution for users to preview, order, and load high-fidelity geodata worldwide.
mission: Design a scalable marketplace accommodating multiple contextual data providers.
Create intuitive pre-visualization tools so users can assess data quality before purchasing.
Develop a seamless monetization and payment flow for complex geospatial datasets.
Integrate high LOD (Level of Detail) building data, starting with the Norway market.
process: Mapped out end-to-end user journeys for selecting geographic boundaries, previewing data, and executing payments.
Iterated in Figma to push the boundaries of how complex data is previewed in-browser before purchase.
Collaborated tightly with data engineers to ensure the UI matched the technical realities of querying and loading worldwide datasets.
kpi: Successfully launched an end-to-end global geodata pipeline and marketplace.
Established a secure, intuitive payment flow for contextual data monetization.
Delivered a frictionless pre-visualization experience reducing user hesitation before purchase.
Successfully integrated high LOD2 building data.
facts: Presented on the main stage at Autodesk University by Autodesk leadership.
Built a scalable UI capable of handling infinite global data providers.

galleryMetadata.description: The contextual data ordering and monetization flow being presented on the main stage at Autodesk University.
The global project setup view, enabling users to locate and initiate site models anywhere in the world.
The intuitive map interface for defining a precise area of interest before querying available geospatial datasets.
The contextual data marketplace interface, allowing users to browse and select datasets from various global providers.
The pre-visualization and purchasing flow, showing users a detailed preview and clear pricing for LOD2 buildings before finalizing an order.
High-fidelity LOD2 building data successfully purchased, seamlessly integrated, and visualized within the Autodesk Forma 3D canvas.
